settings.languageHelp: Applies to CRM navigation and common labels.
settings.quoteBrandingHelp: Logo appears on quote previews and PDFs. Recommended size: 400×120 px (PNG or WebP).
settings.reviewRequestsHelp: Send review links from contacts and closed tickets via Gmail.
settings.googleReviewsUrlHelp: Public link where customers leave a review (Google Business Profile).
settings.reviewTemplateHelp: Uses {{first_name}} and {{google_review_url}}. Create a default or pick any template in Email templates.
settings.noReviewTemplate: No template linked — built-in copy is used until you create one.
settings.pageDescriptionManage: Integrations, templates, duplicates, team, and custom fields.
settings.pageDescriptionMember: Workspace preferences for your team account.
settings.quoteServicesSettingsHelp: Manage the service catalog used on quotes. Open Tools → Services for day-to-day use.
settings.customFieldsHelp: Define extra fields for contacts, opportunities, and tickets.
settings.memberNotice: You are signed in as a workspace teammate ({role}). CRM data is shared with your team. Workspace settings are managed by the owner or an admin.

reviewRequest.title: Request Google review
reviewRequest.previewHint: This email is sent from your connected Gmail account.
reviewRequest.optOut: Do not ask for Google reviews
reviewRequest.optOutHint: Blocks review invitation sends for this contact.
reviewRequest.noEmail: Add an email address to send a review invitation.
reviewRequest.optedOut: This contact opted out of review invitations.
reviewRequest.configureUrl: Set a Google review link in Settings first.
reviewRequest.ticketPrompt: This ticket is closed. Send a Google review invitation to the linked contact?
reviewRequest.gmailRequired: Connect Gmail in Settings to send review invitations.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.description: Quotes with services, PDF export, and contact linking
quotes.quoteTitlePlaceholder: Leave blank for an auto title (e.g. Quote Q-2026-00001)
quotes.quoteTitleHint: A unique reference number is assigned automatically for each quote.
quotes.lineItemsHelp: Pick services from your catalog or add a new one, then save to update totals and the preview.
quotes.customerAcceptanceHint: Share this link so your customer can accept or decline. Responses update quote status and contact activity.

services.title: Services
services.viewerNotice: Your account has view-only access. Open quotes to view service lines on existing quotes.
services.catalogHelp: Services you add here appear when building quotes. Owners and admins can edit prices and remove entries.
services.noServices: No services in the catalog yet.
services.salesManageHint: Sales can add services; only owners and admins can change prices or remove catalog entries.

attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: Upload and manage files linked to contacts and accounts
